title: Biiig Hug
description: Upon pickup, remove [blue]4[/blue] cards from your [gold]Deck[/gold]. Whenever you shuffle your [gold]Draw Pile[/gold], add a [gold]Soot[/gold] into your [gold]Draw Pile[/gold].
flavor: [red]Details for this relic will be revealed in the future...[/red]
notes: Upon picking up this relic, you select 4 cards to permanently remove from your deck. Whenever your draw pile is shuffled, a Soot card is added to your draw pile.
